title: penstemon fruticosus var. scouleri
intro: Penstemon fruticosus var. scouleri, also known as Scouler's penstemon or Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Penstemon fruticosus var. scouleri include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
